year. 

SHORT NAME: MDCD_OPTNL_CVRG_ABD_POP_IND 

LONG NAME: MDCD_OPTNL_CVRG_ABD_POP_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This data element is triggered by a value of “37”–“52” in any instance of 
MC_PLAN_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_CD. These values are: 
37 = Aged, Blind or Disabled Individuals Eligible 
for but Not Receiving Cash Assistance 
38 = Individuals Eligible for Cash Assistance 
except for
